markdown:
#  Permissions Matrix 
Table of Contents 
##  Change Orders 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
Some actions that impact this tool are done in other Procore tools. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like [granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work).   
| Add a Related Item to a Commitment Change Order   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Add a Related Item to a Prime Contract Change Order   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Approve or Reject Commitment Change Orders   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users with 'Standard' level permissions must also be the **Designated Reviewer** on the change order.  |  
| Configure Advanced Settings: Change Orders   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Create a PDF of a Change Order   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Edit a Change Order (Commitment Change Order (CCO))   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * Users must also have 'Admin' level permissions to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  * User permissions for editing change orders are NOT managed by the project's Change Orders tool. Instead, the Change Orders tool is designed for users with 'Admin' level permissions on the Client Contracts, Prime Contracts, or Funding tool AND the project's Commitments tool. It allows authorized users to view and access change orders from one place. 

 |  
| Edit a Change Order (Client Contract, Prime Contract or Funding)   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Email Forward a Change Order   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Review and Respond to Commitment Change Orders   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| View Change Orders (All, Not Private)   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| View Change Orders (Private)   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users must also be added to the 'Private' drop-down list on the contract.  |  
| View Change Orders (Private)   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users must also be the **Designated Reviewer** on the contract.  |  
| View Change Orders (Private, Commitment Change Order (CCO))   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users must also have 'Admin' level permissions to the project's **Commitments** tool.  |  
| View Change Orders (Private, Client Contract, Prime Contract or Funding)   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users must also have 'Admin' level permissions to the project's **Client Contract, Prime Contract or Funding** tool.  |  
#### Admin Tool
The following table highlights which user permissions are required in the project's Admin tool to perform the described user action.  
| Enable the Change Orders Tool   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |
